title: Canada Revenue Agency Departmental Performance Report 2014-15 - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Revenue Agency Departmental Performance Report 2014-15

## Internal Audits and Evaluations
Name of Internal Audit
Internal Audit of the Management of Discipline
Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) relating to the delivery of the Portageur Project between the CRA and Veterans Affairs Canada (Management Letter)
Contract bidding and awards process audit
Internal Audit of Enterprise Risk Management
Five Year Assurance Plan for Agency Compliance Activities 1 (formerly entitled Cyclical Plan for Compliance Activities)
Harmonization of Sales Taxes of Prince Edward Island and De-Harmonization of Sales Taxes of British Columbia Audit
Internal Audit of the Memorandum of Understanding between the CRA and the British Columbia Ministry of Finance (not yet posted on external website)
Link to CRA Program Alignment Architecture
Name of the Evaluation
Commissioner Approval Date
Program: Taxpayer and Business Assistance Subprogram: Taxpayer Services - Enquiries and Information Products
- Subprogram: Taxpayer Services - Enquiries and Information Products
Study of the Accuracy of Telephone Responses to Non-Account Specific Business Enquiries
Program: Internal services Program: Assessment of Returns and Payment Processing
External Administrative Correspondence (EAC) Evaluation
Program: Taxpayer and business assistance Subprogram: Registered plans
- Subprogram: Registered plans
Tax Free Savings Account Evaluation Framework
Program: Reporting compliance Subprogram: International and large business
- Subprogram: International and large business
International Tax Evaluation Study
1.  New engagement title is "Thematic Assurance Plan for Agency Compliance Activities".
